title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at ATS Infrastructure

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at ATS Infrastructure
jsonLd.description:
ATS Infrastructure has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ATS Infrastructure:
ATS Infrastructure is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ATS Infrastructure!
